Jurisdiction MNPI phrase growth 05

HK: Project Pearl remains inside information and is not generally known to persons accustomed to dealing.
AU: Project Banksia includes price-sensitive information that is not generally available before the ASX release.
JP: Project Momiji is an undisclosed tender plan and unpublished material information under the wall-cross list.
KR: Project Hangang contains material information not yet publicly disclosed and must stay inside the restricted list.
